jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Extramarks
jsonLd.description:
Extramarks, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Extramarks:
Extramarks is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Extramarks!
